overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a vibrant cyberpunk-inspired Asian marketplace, rendered in a game engine. The camera moves along a waterfront promenade, ascends stairs to an elevated walkway, and passes through dense urban architecture with neon signage, food stalls, and vending machines.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a red food cart on a concrete waterfront walkway. The camera moves forward along the promenade, passing green metal railings overlooking a canal. A digital advertising kiosk stands on the left, displaying an animated character. The area is sparsely populated with scattered pedestrians.

segments.scene_description: Moving under an elevated highway structure, the scene becomes partially covered. Blue vending machines appear in the center distance while large green trash dumpsters line the right side. The camera approaches a concrete staircase on the left leading upward, while the waterfront railing recedes into the distance.

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the concrete stairs, transitioning to an elevated marketplace. Steam rises from ground vents near food stalls. A green building with red fire escapes dominates the left side. The blue vending machines and digital kiosk are left behind as the camera climbs to the upper level.

segments.scene_description: Walking along the elevated walkway, the camera passes the green building with red fire escapes on the left. Pink neon signs illuminate the storefronts. A person sits on a white bench on the right, while another pedestrian approaches. Pink vending machines appear in the distance on the left.

segments.scene_description: The final segment features pink vending machines moving closer on the left. An anime billboard stands prominently in the center. The camera approaches a covered food stall under a black canopy where a vendor stands. Trash and debris are scattered along the concrete walkway near the waterfront railing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sparse waterfront promenade up into a dense, neon-lit elevated marketplace. It begins at a red food cart on a concrete walkway, gliding past green metal railings and a digital advertising kiosk displaying an animated character. As the camera moves under the shadow of an elevated highway, the open waterfront recedes and the view shifts toward blue vending machines and green dumpsters before turning toward a concrete staircase. The scene then ascends the stairs, leaving the lower level behind as steam rises from vents and a green building with red fire escapes comes into view. Finally, the camera traverses the upper walkway past pink neon signs and a white bench, moving toward an anime billboard and a covered food stall where a vendor stands amidst scattered debris.
